summary: Completed Phase 1 testing of Norma Facile 2.0. Backend APIs working correctly with Italian responses, landing page loads perfectly with Italian UI, login redirects to Emergent auth correctly. Found one critical issue with dashboard protection not redirecting unauthenticated users.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 401 instead of 501 for Phase 2 APIs
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior difference - APIs return auth error instead of not implemented
minor_issues.note: This is actually correct behavior as APIs are auth-protected. 401 is appropriate response.

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard shows loading spinner indefinitely for unauthenticated users instead of redirecting to landing page
integration_issues.details: ProtectedRoute component authentication check gets stuck in loading state rather than redirecting to '/' when user is not authenticated

passed_tests: GET /api/ returns Italian welcome message ('Benvenuto a Norma Facile 2.0')
Landing page loads with proper Italian UI ('Norma Facile' title)
Login buttons ('Accedi', 'Inizia Gratuitamente') are present and functional
Login button redirects correctly to Emergent auth (https://auth.emergentagent.com)
Italian content throughout landing page displays correctly
Landing page responsive design and styling working properly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (3/3 core tests passed), Frontend: 80% (4/5 tests passed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix ProtectedRoute component authentication flow. The dashboard protection is not working - unauthenticated users see infinite loading spinner instead of being redirected to landing page. Check the Navigate component usage and authentication state management in ProtectedRoute.js
